title: Crucible Experiment Run Record (experiment_record.v1)
description: The per-run index envelope — the one net-new output contract of the Crucible results surface (crucible_ux_output_plan_260708.md §4.3, ratified 2026-07-08; Phase A, config#1966). Binds WHAT ran (manifest hash + inline copy, per-slot implementation fingerprints, git SHAs, data snapshot) to WHAT it emitted (a typed link table of artifacts, each carrying its contract name + schema version). The results renderer consumes THIS record, never a directory listing — a partial run renders honestly (missing artifact → N/A panel with reason, mirroring the report card's own discipline). Reproducibility-first: the record answers 'exactly what ran?' before 'how did it do?'. Evolution is ADDITIVE-ONLY.

run_date.description: Trading-day key per DATE_CONVENTIONS.md dual-track rule

status.description: partial = some declared artifacts absent (each absence carries a reason in the artifacts table); failed = the run aborted before producing gradeable output

hash.description: Content hash of the canonicalized experiment.v1 manifest — the Compare view's same-config equality check

inline.description: Verbatim copy of the manifest that ran (experiment.v1)

slots.description: One fingerprint per slot that ran

data_snapshot.description: Resolved PIT snapshot id the run actually read (never 'latest' — the record stores the resolution)

git.description: Repo → commit SHA map for the platform components that executed

artifacts.description: Typed link table of every artifact the run declared it would emit

name.description: Logical artifact name (e.g. report_card, signal_quality, pit_parity)

reason.description: Why absent (absent only) — the renderer surfaces this verbatim

contract.description: Contract name in nousergon_lib.contracts when the artifact is schema-governed
